name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] Consequential decision executed without proven authority
message: A consequential agent decision (guardrail_override) proceeded without the required review/approval — the decision record shows no reviewer in its `authority` field. This is the decision-scoped complement to the tool-level 'high-risk action without approval' monitor: it fires on the DECISION object, giving investigators the full record (evidence, options, selected action, business outcome) not just the tool call. Zero-tolerance governance control. Escalate to Architecture + Responsible AI/Risk. @security-oncall @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_ref: docs/decision-contract.md §5 (governance rules) + §7 (P0 authority record). Complements monitors/high-risk-action-without-approval.json by asserting on the first-class decision record rather than the guardrail span alone.
